questions.question: Describe the key differences between the Parametric and Empirical Estimation Models, explaining how they approach estimating the effort and complexity of software projects. (15 marks)
Choose the most suitable empirical estimation model for a software project with high uncertainty and a complex system. Explain your reasoning. (10 marks)

A software development team uses the Expert Judgment estimation method to estimate the effort required for a project. What are the assumptions and limitations of this method, and how can they impact the estimation process? (10 marks)
